name: Apple Pancakes from the Townships
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder (1 tablespoon), baking soda, salt, sugar, and cinnamon.
2. In a small bowl, beat the buttermilk and eggs.
3. Add the apples (unpeeled and cut into small pieces) and melted butter to the buttermilk mixture.
4. Pour the liquid ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir well until combined.
5. Cook as you would ordinary pancakes in a greased cast iron frying pan, cooking until brown on both sides.
6. Serve plain or with butter and maple syrup.
